channel.title: Oil Refinery on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Oil Refinery on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Uncle Ramesh Sees It Differently — Thursday, April 16, 2026
item.description: Ramesh counts the drug seizures, admires the refinery vision, and has a few measured thoughts on the state of regional leadership.

item.title: Guyana Daily Brief — Thursday, April 16, 2026
item.description: A building falls down, CANU counts its money, airfares about to get worse, and Sir Ronald Sanders is done being polite about CARICOM.

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently - Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Ramesh is absolutely certain the fuel situation is managed, the Ambassador made a fair point, and the park's new name is culturally significant.

item.title: The Guyana Daily Brief – Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Fuel lines, a dead Nicaraguan pilot, a detective under arrest, oil diplomacy, and a war that is somehow Guyana's problem now. Tuesday's brief.
